redis_py.signature: vadd(, key: KeyT,, vector: Union[List[float], bytes],, element: str,, reduce_dim: Optional[int] = None,, cas: Optional[bool] = False,, quantization: Optional[QuantizationOptions] = None,, ef: Optional[Number] = None,, attributes: Optional[Union[dict, str]] = None,, numlinks: Optional[int] = None,)

jedis.signature: boolean vadd(String key, float[] vector, String element)

params.name: key
params.description: the name of the key that will hold the vector set data

params.name: vector
params.description: the vector as floating point numbers

params.name: element
params.description: the name of the element that is being added to the vector set

returns.description: 1 if key was added; 0 if key was not added
